channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: St David’s Bonda Girls’ High School Teacher On The Run Over Student Abuse Allegations
item.description: Married Teacher Flees As Manicaland Boarding School Abuse Scandal Erupts A teacher at St David’s Bonda Girls’ High School has fled his home and gone into hiding after multiple students came forward with harrowing sexual abuse allegations, triggering a manhunt across Manicaland pr #Zimbabwe #Education #ZimbabweEducation #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Dynamos FC Changes Position on Match-Fixing Allegations — What We Know So Far
item.description: Dynamos FC clarifies its position on match-fixing allegations outlining internal investigations responses and key developments shaping Zimbabwe football debate today situation unfolding The post Dynamos FC Changes Position on Match-Fixing Allegations — What We Know So Far appeare #Zimbabwe #Sport #ZimbabweSport #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Consignment Of Twice-A-Year Lenacapavir HIV Prevention Injection To Reach Zimbabwe In July
item.description: Twice-A-Year Lenacapavir HIV Prevention Injection Coming To Zimbabwe Zimbabwe is set to receive a fresh consignment of Lenacapavir, the breakthrough HIV prevention injection administered just twice a year, in July as health authorities expand access to one of the world’s most effective tools for preventing HIV infection. Officials say the rollout is expected to benefit [...] The post Consignment Of Twice-A-Year Lenacapavir HIV Prevention Injection To Reach Zimbabwe In July appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Mnangagwa In Matemadanda Covid Poisoning Revelations?
item.description: By A Correspondent | The public is today expecting to hear President Emmerson Mnangagwa reveal the cause of war veterans’... Continue reading "Mnangagwa In Matemadanda Covid Poisoning Revelations?" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Unidentified Man Killed by Train at Melfort Bridge Near Marondera @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: Man Killed by Train After Sitting on Railway Tracks Near Marondera An unidentified man died after he was struck and run over by a Zimbabwe National Railways train while sitting on railway tracks at Melfort Bridge in Marondera late on Tuesday night. The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) confirmed the fatal incident, which occurred at around [...] The post Unidentified Man Killed by Train at Melfort Bridge Near Marondera appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Obert Gutu Reveals His Identity @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: By A Correspondent | Former MDC spokesperson turned Zanu PF member Obert Gutu has revealed his ancestral identity, saying he... Continue reading "Obert Gutu Reveals His Identity" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Retired Major General Everisto Dzihwema Dies While Receiving Treatment in India
item.description: Zimbabwe is mourning the death of Retired Major General Everisto Dzihwema, a former senior military officer who later served in key government positions. Dzihwema died while receiving treatment in India. His death has been described as a loss to the country, especially among those who knew his long service in both the security sector and... The post Retired Major General Everisto Dzihwema Dies While Receiving Treatment in India appeared first on Mbare Times. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mbare Times

item.title: Zimbabwe’s lithium export ban winning global support – Finance Minister says
item.description: FINANCE Minister Mthuli Ncube says Zimbabwe’s policy of banning the export of raw lithium while incentivising local value addition has been well received by global investors and policymakers attending the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in China. Speaking on the sidelines of the forum in Dalian, Ncube said discussions had focused on emerging technologies such [...] The post Zimbabwe’s lithium export ban winning global support – Finance Minister says appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Pressure mounts on Mnangagwa to refer CAB3 to referendum before signing into law
item.description: FRESH pressure is mounting on President Emmerson Mnangagwa not to sign Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 into law, with civic organisation WeThePeople urging him to first subject the controversial legislation to a national referendum. The Bill, which seeks to extend the terms of the President, Parliament and local authorities beyond 2028, has cleared Parliament after [...] The post Pressure mounts on Mnangagwa to refer CAB3 to referendum before signing into law appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shocking incest saga rock Matabeleland family: Marriage collapses as wife enjoys lula lula with her uncle
item.description: Betrayal or Blackmail? The Incest Allegation Tearing a Matabeleland Family Apart In the quiet stretches of Matabeleland South, where traditional values and family ties are the bedrock of the community, a scandal has emerged that threatens to shatter the very foundations of a loca #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘I choose constitutionalism over expediency’ – Nonhlanhla Mlotshwa’s CAB3 Senate objection @zimsituation
item.description: ‘The framers of our constitution understood that there may come a day when those in positions of authority would seek to alter constitutional terms of office’ Source: ‘I choose constitutionalism over expediency’ – Nonhlanhla Mlotshwa’s CAB3 Senate objection – Zimbabwe News Now Matabeleland South senator Nonhlanhla Mlotshwa Only 4 senators voted against the passage of [...] The post ‘I choose constitutionalism over expediency’ – Nonhlanhla Mlotshwa’s CAB3 Senate objection appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Parliament reconvenes to tighten CAB3 @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Parliament reconvenes to tighten CAB3 – herald Justice Minister Ziyambi Ziyambi Nyore Madzianike Senior Reporter PARLIAMENT is set to reconvene on Tuesday next week to consider and vote on amendments proposed by the Senate to Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3, which were overlooked by the National Assembly when it deliberated on the proposed piece [...] The post Parliament reconvenes to tighten CAB3 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe courts global investors at World Economic Forum
item.description: FINANCE Minister Mthuli Ncube has showcased Zimbabwe’s economic performance and investment opportunities at the 17th Annual Meeting of the New Champions in Dalian, China, as the government intensifies efforts to attract foreign direct investment. Addressing delegates at the World Economic Forum event, Ncube said Zimbabwe’s economic fundamentals remained strong, citing newly released data showing the [...] The post Zimbabwe courts global investors at World Economic Forum appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chiredzi man accused of insulting Mnangagwa, Chivayo in viral video granted US$200 bail @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A 32-year-old Chiredzi resident, Tafadzwa Nelton Matanhuse, who spent two nights in custody after a video of him allegedly criticizing President Emmerson Mnangagwa and controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo went viral, has been granted US$200 bail. Matanhuse is facing charges of inciting public violence. He appeared before Chiredzi magistrate Tendai Mutamba on Thursday, who ruled that [...] The post Chiredzi man accused of insulting Mnangagwa, Chivayo in viral video granted US$200 bail appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Harare lawyer flagged for writing letter to Mnangagwa to arm-twist courts in property feud
item.description: A HARARE-based legal practitioner Kundai Gloria Gumbo is under scrutiny after a businessman lodged a formal complaint with the Law Society of Zimbabwe (LSZ) accusing her of breaching professional ethics by seeking executive intervention in a High Court matter. Gumbo, who represents Kurt Louis Heyns in a protracted ownership wrangle, is accused by Believe Guta, [...] The post Harare lawyer flagged for writing letter to Mnangagwa to arm-twist courts in property feud appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
